question: US - Iran nuclear deal by end of June?
reason: Ongoing negotiations and unresolved technical details hinder a formal agreement by June 30.
evidence: President Trump stated that final aspects of the deal are being discussed and will be announced shortly.
A senior U.S. official mentioned that Iran has agreed in principle to dispose of highly-enriched uranium, but a final agreement is still pending.
The U.S. military conducted 'self-defense' strikes in Iran, indicating ongoing tensions despite negotiations.
International skepticism exists regarding the proposed deal's effectiveness in addressing Iran's nuclear program.
The Strait of Hormuz remains closed, affecting global trade and indicating unresolved issues.
Some Republican lawmakers oppose the deal, arguing it may leave Iran politically empowered.
searchQueries: US Iran nuclear deal negotiations May 2026 latest news
